욥기 21:2.content: “Listen diligently to my speech. Let this be your consolation.

욥기 21:3.content: Allow me, and I also will speak; After I have spoken, mock on.

욥기 21:4.content: As for me, is my complaint to man? Why shouldn’t I be impatient?

욥기 21:5.content: Look at me, and be astonished. Lay your hand on your mouth.

욥기 21:6.content: When I remember, I am troubled. Horror takes hold of my flesh.

욥기 21:7.content: “Why do the wicked live, become old, yes, and grow mighty in power?

욥기 21:8.content: Their child is established with them in their sight, their offspring before their eyes.

욥기 21:9.content: Their houses are safe from fear, neither is the rod of God upon them.

욥기 21:10.content: Their bulls breed without fail. Their cows calve, and don’t miscarry.

욥기 21:11.content: They send out their little ones like a flock. Their children dance.

욥기 21:12.content: They sing to the tambourine and harp, and rejoice at the sound of the pipe.

욥기 21:13.content: They spend their days in prosperity. In an instant they go down to Sheol.

욥기 21:14.content: They tell God, ‘Depart from us, for we don’t want to know about your ways.

욥기 21:15.content: What is the Almighty, that we should serve him? What profit should we have, if we pray to him?’

욥기 21:16.content: Behold, their prosperity is not in their hand. The counsel of the wicked is far from me.

욥기 21:17.content: “How often is it that the lamp of the wicked is put out, that their calamity comes on them, that God distributes sorrows in his anger?

욥기 21:18.content: How often is it that they are as stubble before the wind, as chaff that the storm carries away?

욥기 21:19.content: You say, ‘God lays up his iniquity for his children.’ Let him recompense it to himself, that he may know it.

욥기 21:20.content: Let his own eyes see his destruction. Let him drink of the wrath of the Almighty.

욥기 21:21.content: For what does he care for his house after him, when the number of his months is cut off?

욥기 21:22.content: “Shall any teach God knowledge, since he judges those who are high?

욥기 21:23.content: One dies in his full strength, being wholly at ease and quiet.

욥기 21:24.content: His pails are full of milk. The marrow of his bones is moistened.

욥기 21:25.content: Another dies in bitterness of soul, and never tastes of good.

욥기 21:26.content: They lie down alike in the dust. The worm covers them.

욥기 21:27.content: “Behold, I know your thoughts, the plans with which you would wrong me.

욥기 21:28.content: For you say, ‘Where is the house of the prince? Where is the tent in which the wicked lived?’

욥기 21:29.content: Haven’t you asked wayfaring men? Don’t you know their evidences,

욥기 21:30.content: that the evil man is reserved to the day of calamity, That they are led out to the day of wrath?

욥기 21:31.content: Who will declare his way to his face? Who will repay him what he has done?

욥기 21:32.content: Yet he will be borne to the grave. Men will keep watch over the tomb.

욥기 21:33.content: The clods of the valley will be sweet to him. All men will draw after him, as there were innumerable before him.

욥기 21:34.content: So how can you comfort me with nonsense, because in your answers there remains only falsehood?”
